```javascript
function solve(nums) {
    const n = nums.length;
    if (n <= 1) {
        return [0]; // Or return Array(n).fill(0); which handles N=1 correctly
    }

    const answer = new Array(n).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        const parityI = nums[i] % 2;
        let count = 0;

        for (let j = i + 1; j < n; j++) {
            const parityJ = nums[j] % 2;

            // Check if parities are different
            if (parityI !== parityJ) {
                count++;
            }
        }
        answer[i] = count;
    }

    return answer;
}
